he185d72agacbbg4d17g9c9ag29316584303c: Oh. Good morning. I'm sorry, but I'm not in the best of moods - I tire of these dreams.
h531a485dgb4fag4c99gb02aga3874f197b83: Dreams. The word implies desire, but we're being played for fools. These are nothing but delusions.
h9f6b331dg6adfg41f8g8e08gcb0af7a770d0: What makes you so sure they're delusions?
hf3cec173g2f6fg47b2gac16ge36b3a366c44: Because their promises are perfect, and in perfection lies their flaw.
h0a9fa890gf717g49d1g9e8dg58b2fa01a0b0: It's the tadpoles reading our every desire, but they don't read between the lines.
h48ac7a94g7f80g40b4g911bg095f876df259: They don't know some things are impossible. They don't know that...
hcd99552ag0a1eg45d8ga38dgacc922794f45: Gale, who is the apparition in your dreams?
h32e1cc11g75e0g44c8ga04ag348f2dd4b8df: She's... It doesn't matter. I just know her to be unreal.
hd193ed09gf0d7g4f7aga728gf6f23f412c75: So it's Mystra you see. Of course it is.
h341594c3g3d01g48deg97a8gae44071bc098: I... Why, yes. Clearly the tadpole isn't the only one who can read me like a book.
h78a5c188gc150g4f0dg81b9ge8cb33c95fbd: It is her I see. And yet it cannot be. There was a time when I would have believed - but no longer.
h076b47f5gfe80g4183g9872g9439d82086df: The figure I conjured was Mystra herself. The Lady of Mysteries.
h3b99915eg1246g462agaf45g863d592d0691: Things were different once, between the goddess and me. But things have changed.
h12dbded3gce3dg4061gbe6dg9c544ada74bc: Suffice it to say she would not bestow upon me the favours promised in these dreams. That is how I know they are delusions.
h21280532g7adfg4248g8452g6c13ea29591c: The parasite has plans for us, enacted through seduction and the promise of power.
hc11da1bbg6aa6g4a54gb94ag8c9b87533e12: Don't be fooled. Behind the lips it wants us to kiss hide cold steel razor teeth.
h9dc3fc6dgf91dg493agbaadg56dfa2e60d93: Such a touching scene - I almost hate to interrupt it. But you were not the only ones to dream this night.
h1ee0c9cbgb89dg41efg8396g89d054d7d7fb: Has it escaped you that exploiting the tadpole conjures these visions for us all?
hd7ef6ee8gdfa7g449dgb0d8g127d35449d93: Like I said: the parasite has plans for us, and I doubt those plans take our wellbeing into account.
h622ac79fg4123g49a6gb9ccg28baa467567d: For once, Gale speaks clear. Whatever the parasite offers, deny it.
h999b6994g3ce7g49ceg8abcgc33d06e9abbd: I will avoid using the tadpole. It can only mean trouble.
h282a1267g549bg446fg8a27ge7f48b6a66d8: I think that would be best.
h4210f0fegf78bg4833gab9ag8ec87ab84b03: The tadpole has proved useful. I will use its influence where I can.
h210f735age680g4895ga96dg162d2d11eafb: You are the one who is useful to it. Beware that is does not overpower you.
h7441c1cdgd402g4052g9f8ege7397a610802: We can make do. There's plenty of ways to manipulate someone without resorting to that.
hcba14183g2027g4d5eg8521g5df7f1022b11: Just because they're connected, that doesn't mean we should stop. Let's not throw away that power over some dreams.
hd0f77d9egcf2cg4aafg849dgbdcb768739de: |Karlach: Yeah, we need to stop. Who knows what these visions might bring?|
hecd62fe1g801dg4fbcg930ag6195ea257668: Agreed - enough with the mind-twiddling. I'm not keen on travelling wherever these dreams lead us.
h3fdf0393g4d6cg46cag92ccgc55723b0e493: I think I can guess what you two are talking about - the dreams, yes? The visitor?
ha1118d6bg09e4g491cg81d4gb69f6d5c0ade: This began when we started using our infection to influence the minds of others. I don't think that's a coincidence.
h9f174807g3cebg4434gb747gfbc3cc8893ee: I couldn't help but eavesdrop on you. It seems we all had interesting dreams.
h90ae29b9g69c5g47c2g9ed7ga18c787d3345: Since we started using our condition to influence others, I've been hearing things at night. And now these dreams? They have to be connected.
h67dfa098g70f2g493bgbe41g0513a92c38f7: |It's caused by using the tadpole to steer minds.|
h6a8c6a77gdbacg443eg8eb6g0668111e56a8: I hear you had dreams too? The brain-bugs got busy last night. And I've got a theory.
h72fdfbd2g0c9cg4019gaaa8g4ada90aed94c: When you call on the tadpole to influence others, we pay the price that very night. All of us.
h2728266dg229fg4ff3ga0a0g952b962f0b8c: |It's caused by using the tadpole to steer minds.|
hf4f84dd6g11ecg48cagbc2dgabd584e6a3be: |It's caused by using the tadpole to steer minds.|
h5a452dc0gf15dg4607gab46gea658b80b6d9: Don't be fooled. Behind the lips it wants us to kiss hide cold steel razor teeth. Of all people, I'm sure you understand.
h63cae6d1g3a33g4d58g8e25gc42a27588b56: I told you that I lost her. Lost her favour and lost so many of the powers I took for granted.
h089f4d66gd6d8g4f63gb9b9g5cea506d6297: What magic I can still weave is met only with undercurrents of disapproving silence. Mystra has not changed her mind about me.
h321e7a16g1949g403bgbd24g19bbcc33cc99: That is how I know our dreams are delusions.
h20f9a6e0g832ag4840g887ag1eb48a4a4a6b: It is indeed Mystra I see. And yet it cannot be her. There was a time when I would have believed - but no longer.
hcb460cc1g9a79g45f4g8cb6g91cd7ec724c8: It is Mystra I see. And yet it cannot be her. There was a time when I would have believed - but no longer.
ha2822ba3g1e50g47b0g9b64gba9a93ea5f11: She? Is it the woman I saw you conjure over your palm?
haea1e3e5g2bbdg4345gbe20g460a76717693: She? It's not Mystra, is it?
he476806ag295fg4750g9dfcg9e18a2a62523: She? It's not Mystra, is it?
h51e88dc8gd1d8g46f6gaaf6g4fa85ec10bca: Come, you can tell me. We're among friends here.
h770907e1gcc04g4d48gb0a2gbab7454e36d6: Another time maybe. I've said too much already.
hba3548a4g2652g459ag9ba2g1d8086602ddf: If you say so. Now let's get going.
hfb29597dg5f39g4f31g8a93ga6b722909d6f: What's impossible about what you're being shown?
hc0a3ad79g725dg4a2fga8e2g4ac0dcadedcb: I'll leave you to your ruminations.
h9ff8f227g12abg4074gb891gf5623382ca08: Remember: these are nothing but delusions.
h37593226gd9d7g4df3g8e13g9c3a8594072e: Don't let the illithid's close readings persuade you of good intent.
h5b647ac1ge18dg4d0ag829fg6efdf629873f: I recall you being a lot more enthusiastic after our first collective dream.
hc08482acgc392g4b9dg917age6e00fc992af: I never said I'm not among the fools.
h2cc5b1b8g4daag4460gb9b7gfefcb8d81d08: These dreams are too good to be true, and I can tell you exactly why:
h3fac143dgbe16g4147gbfefgfed47fe2aab2: The power we're given is real, and there's no denying that.
h8e050e9bg2945g4465gbe98g4ba0b97081c1: It's not because they're real, that they don't deceive. Give it candy and a child stops asking questions.
